feedback.text: The DFA should add protection for games (always online or other online requirement) which are in danger of getting wiped by the game's publisher thus preventing playing the game you own. Good examples are the most of Blizzard's games which usually require always online component with multiplayer that is possible only when their servers are online. If the servers are offline, the game doesn't even launch. The EU needs to support consumer rights to preserve the games they own in playable state.
